item.diary.page.1: April 14 — The lights flicker on the third floor again. I told the guard. He laughed.
item.diary.page.2: April 17 — Something in red. I can see it only through the wrong lens. I'm not imagining it.
item.recorder.page.1: [Static] ...the code is 3-0-7-1, do not write it down, do NOT— [click]
item.love_letter.page.1: My dear, if you find this, the key is under the brass statue by the east corridor.
